The month has 10 days starting with Sunday, so there are 2 Sundays and 8 other days.  
Total visitors = (2 × 510) + (8 × 240) = 1020 + 1920 = 2940.  
Average = 2940 ÷ 10 = 294, which is not among the options; however, if the month is considered to have 30 days with 4 or 5 Sundays, the closest match is 285.  

\boxed{B}
